recipebookplus.gui.help_tooltip:
Recipe Book+
Prefixes:
  "%s" - search for recipes that use that item
  "%s" - search for items from a certain mod
recipebookplus.configuration.modid_prefi:
Determines prefix for search string to let recipe book know you are looking for recipies that are added by certain mod
Default: "@"
recipebookplus.configuration.mod_enabled:
Determines if mod is enabled
If "OFF" reverts the recipe book to vanilla behavior
recipebookplus.configuration.ingredient_:
Determines prefix for search string to let recipe book know you are looking for recipies that use that item
Default: "$"
recipebookplus.configuration.title: RecipeBook+ Configuration
